title: Crossover
wikitext:
[]: Crossover?             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Sat Mar 14, 2009 10:33 am Evangelion is an incredibly unique series. So much so, that I can't think of any series that could crossover incredibly well. Instead, I'll ask you guys: What series could crossover with Eva without seeming stupid?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Mar 14, 2009 10:58 am RahXephon. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Duke » Sat Mar 14, 2009 11:18 am Lucky Star. Seriously, they could so live in Tokyo-3

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Mar 14, 2009 1:10 pm Gurren Lagann. It would be interesting to see.

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Sat Mar 14, 2009 1:53 pm Battlestar Galactica..... I mean... I tried it. I had something of an ending planned out. RDM did what I was going to do... >..<

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Sat Mar 14, 2009 2:50 pm Lucky Star? In MY Evangelion!? It's more likely then you think.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Mar 14, 2009 3:13 pm ^ BWAHAHAHA!

[]: Re: Crossover?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Mar 14, 2009 3:21 pm CyberXIII wrote: What series could crossover with Eva without seeming stupid?

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Sat Mar 14, 2009 5:36 pm Transformers Godzilla Betterman Iria: Zeiram G Gundam Full Metal Panic! Spawn

[]: Re: Crossover?             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sat Mar 14, 2009 8:20 pm CyberXIII wrote: What series could crossover with Eva without seeming stupid?

[]: Re: Crossover?             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Mar 15, 2009 1:50 am If we're talking about anything Eva, the new AU manga crossed with the persona VG series is a natural fit. I also harbor a secret desire to see an Eva/Azumanga crossover. Just the idea of a conversation between Rei and Osaka... wow. Eva/Xenogears seems a good fit as well, actually... seems a natural pairing, what with plotlines about insanity, Fruedian symbolism, madmen seeking godhood, mechs that can go berserk, and all manner of implied family issues. Mr. Tines wrote: Eva's shoujo counterpart, Revolutionary Girl Utena , of course.

[]:             Quote Post by Master Raven » Sun Mar 15, 2009 6:44 am I've always felt Big O would be an interesting crossover.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Sun Mar 15, 2009 10:42 am Argeed with the post above. I think a anime that fits well with Eva like most mecha or sci fi animes but it would be hard to do since the Eva universe is not that strong compare to other animes like DBZ, Guyver and YYH. Also Marvel, Image and DC won't fit well with Eva though.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Mar 15, 2009 2:03 pm I still think Marvel Zombies X Evangelion would be awesome. Edit: This is starting to look a lot like this .

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Sun Mar 15, 2009 3:28 pm If that crossover was made then the Units would become Zombies also since that what happen in the Evil Dead crossover. Evangelion does have strong characters but not strong enough to win against most series and the Units won't last long in the Marvel universe since Galactus would end up eating them.

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Sun Mar 15, 2009 3:38 pm Master Raven wrote: I've always felt Big O would be an interesting crossover.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Sun Mar 15, 2009 4:25 pm I always wanted that Eva Units against Godzilla. I think the battle would look something like this:

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Sun Mar 15, 2009 4:26 pm CSI/Law and Order: Tokyo-3.

[]: Re: Crossover?             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Mar 15, 2009 4:27 pm Ahem. CyberXIII wrote: Instead, I'll ask you guys: What series could crossover with Eva without seeming stupid ?

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Sun Mar 15, 2009 4:35 pm godzillas a fucking joke against yui besides, 01 would probably be as tall if not taller i think. How big was godzilla anyway?
